phases.name: Foundation & Design
phases.goal: Build the camp. Design system, core pages, analytics, deployment pipeline.

phases.name: Content Engine
phases.goal: Build the content machine. Blog posts, SEO pages, keyword targeting.

phases.name: Traffic Hunting
phases.goal: Drive first traffic. SEO optimization, backlinks, social presence.

phases.name: Conversion & Growth
phases.goal: Convert visitors. Email capture, lead magnets, CTAs, funnels.

phases.name: Product & Monetization
phases.goal: Build products. Skills marketplace, courses, blueprints.

phases.name: Scale & Automate
phases.goal: Scale everything. Multi-agent operations, content automation, growth loops.

phases.name: Empire Building
phases.goal: Multiple websites. Multiple agents. The AI Agent Operator empire.
